event: 3 weeks of lower extremity edema, fatigue, and shortness of breath
Diffuse lymphadenopathy concerning for metastatic lymphoma
Pathology findings consistent with Hodgkin lymphoma

No regional wall motion abnormalities or evidence of pericardial effusion

No significant degree of abdominal compression associated with the ultrasound examination
Telemetry changes confirmed on continuous 12-lead rhythm strips

Kidney, ureter, and abdominal radiograph confirmed the presence of significant gastric distention and findings consistent with ileus
